easy.title: Two Sum
easy.problem: Given an array of integers `nums` and an integer `target`, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to `target`.

easy.title: Palindrome Number
easy.problem: Given an integer `x`, return `true` if `x` is a palindrome, and `false` otherwise.

medium.title: Longest Palindromic Substring
medium.problem: Given a string `s`, return the longest palindromic substring in `s`.

medium.title: Reverse Integer
medium.problem: Given a signed 32-bit integer `x`, return `x` with its digits reversed. If reversing `x` causes the value to go outside the signed 32-bit integer range [-2^31, 2^31 - 1], then return 0.
medium.constraints: Assume the environment does not allow you to store 64-bit integers.

hard.title: Merge k Sorted Lists
hard.problem: You are given an array of k linked-lists `lists`. Merge all the linked-lists into one sorted linked-list.
hard.constraints: Time: O(N log k). Memory: O(1) extra.

hard.title: Trapping Rain Water
hard.problem: Given `n` non-negative integers representing an elevation map where the width of each bar is 1, compute how much water it can trap after raining.
